operator_scope.semantic_signature: correctness failure from contiguous-only address math or unique-index assumption

valid_when: A candidate passes contiguous public cases but fails hidden or robustness cases involving non-contiguous strides, broadcasted/expanded operands, gather/scatter indices, or duplicate scatter-add destinations.
invalid_when: Failure is a compile error, dtype unsupported error, or pure numerical tolerance issue unrelated to indexing/layout.
preconditions: Inspect task trace for shape, stride, index dtype, and duplicate-index coverage.

mechanism: The common failure is treating logical tensor order as physical contiguous order or treating scatter-add as unique-index scatter; both can survive simple public tests and fail hidden layout/indexing cases.

instructions: Replace linear contiguous pointer arithmetic with explicit shape/stride offset calculation for every non-contiguous or broadcast-capable operand.
Add or restore masks for tail tiles and index bounds checks.
For scatter-add mismatch, check whether duplicate indices were overwritten instead of accumulated, then switch to atomics or a staged reduction consistent with OpSpec.
Remove Python-side contiguous(), permute(), reshape(), or high-level indexing calls if they perform the target layout operation in the submitted path.
Add local tests that vary strides, base offsets, singleton broadcast dimensions, and duplicate indices without using hidden shapes.
action.patch_hint: Print or inspect public tensor strides in the harness-visible path if allowed; do not hardcode a stride pattern inferred from one input.

expected_effect.correctness: Targets a recurring semantic failure class for layout/indexing tasks.
expected_effect.performance: No performance claim; repairs may initially slow the kernel due to extra address arithmetic.
expected_effect.search_efficiency: Directs correctness repair toward stride/index/collision bugs rather than blind tile tuning.
expected_effect.risk: Over-generalizing all operands as arbitrary-stride can add overhead; specialize only after correctness and legality are established.

validation.promotion_policy: Promote only after actual A3 traces show this signature predicts and repairs failures.

known_failures: This repair does not address wrong activation formulas or reduction accumulation dtype.
Stride-aware arithmetic can hide an unrelated output layout mismatch if output strides are also wrong.
